title: Custom Joinery Fitout — Cremorne
summary: Custom wardrobes, walk-in robe, laundry and vanity joinery in Cremorne delivered with a slim shaker profile and warm timber contrast.
heroAlt: Cremorne custom joinery wardrobes and laundry fitout
overview: This Cremorne fitout focused on the kinds of rooms that make day-to-day living smoother: wardrobes, a walk-in robe, the laundry and vanity storage. The joinery needed to feel tailored and calm, with enough detail to lift the rooms without making them feel busy.
materials: Slim Shaker profile in polyurethane Dulux finish
Custom internal layouts for wardrobes and storage zones
Durable finishes suited to daily use areas like laundry and vanity

afterImages.caption: Slim shaker wardrobe doors in a clean polyurethane finish with a more tailored, built-in feel.
The walk-in robe used slim shaker detailing, Polytec Boston Oak and polyurethane shelving and drawers for a premium but practical result.
Laundry joinery combined top and bottom storage with an undermount stainless steel sink in a compact, hard-working layout.
The vanity joinery carried the same clean detailing into the bathroom, with full-height storage and concealed utility space.

beforeImages.caption: Before installation showing the base structure of the space.

spaces.title: Wardrobes
spaces.text: Custom wardrobes designed with better internal layouts, combining hanging, drawers and shelving for practical everyday use.

spaces.title: Walk-in wardrobe
spaces.text: The walk-in robe was planned to maximise storage while keeping the layout clean and easy to access.

spaces.title: Laundry
spaces.text: Laundry joinery focused on full-height cabinetry and a compact, efficient working layout.

spaces.title: Vanity
spaces.text: The vanity carried through the same slim shaker detailing and material palette for a consistent finish.

outcome: The finished joinery gives each room a cleaner built-in feel, with the slim shaker profile and timber accents adding warmth without losing practicality.
ctaText: Planning wardrobes, laundry joinery or a multi-room custom fitout? We can help map out the layout, finishes and next steps clearly.
